name: cut
description: Extract selected fields or character positions from each line of text. Reads from standard input and outputs only the requested portions. Use -f to select fields (tab-delimited by default), -d to set a custom delimiter, -c for character positions, and -b for byte positions. Use for extracting columns from CSV or TSV data, pulling specific fields from log files, or slicing fixed-width text.

input.description: Text to extract from, provided on standard input. The first argument is the selection flags (e.g. '-f1,3', '-d, -f2', '-c1-10').

output.description: Selected fields or character ranges from each input line, one per line.
